subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I bear witness, and so too do Thy holy angels, the dwellers of Thy Most Exalted Realm, and the inhabitants of Thy Most Glorious Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی اشهدک و ملائکه قدسک و ملا افقک الاعلی و سکان ملکوتک الابهی
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for protection, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa
